name: passcode.recovery.set
title: Set Recovery Lock Command
description: Set or clear the Recovery Lock password.

payload.content: Sets or clears the recovery lock password (Apple Silicon devices only). Requires the "Device lock and passcode removal right".

payloadkeys.content: If the device has a Recovery Lock password set, the system requires the current password.
The new password for Recovery Lock. Set as an empty string to clear the Recovery Lock password.
